steps.title: Stay on the same row
steps.content: The sentence asks for the 1995 copper production of the country that mined 0.55 million metric tons in 2020. The needed value must come from that same country's row in the table.

steps.title: Reject values from other rows
steps.content: A, B, and D each give a 1995 figure from a different country rather than the country with 0.55 million metric tons in 2020. The same row's 1995 value is 0.26 million metric tons. The answer is C.
